prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约699→1089→578，2024年出现明显后移（扩招后竞争加剧），2025年大幅反弹至578名，波动较大；2025年基准约578名；本省理科计划2023年35人、2024年35人、2025年32人；2026年计划32人，与2025年持平，但新疆2026年高考总人数约23.8万人（较2025年约7.65万人大幅增加约3倍） ，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第14名，近年排名持续上升（2021年19→2025年13→2026年14），属全国顶尖理工类高校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及宫琳师德失范等舆情事件，但学校应对较为迅速；抖音热度排名第47（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，整体关注度尚可；信 息与通信工程、控制科学与工程为A+；计算机科学与技术、机械工程、材料科学与工程、光学工程为A；数学、物理学、力学等为A-；共12个A类学科，工科实力极强，对高分考生 吸引力大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与北理工优势学科高度匹配；新疆2026年考生总数大幅增加。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次578、2026年招生计划持平、新疆考生总数大幅增加（竞争加剧）以及学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年理科最低位次小 幅后移至约608名，区间535–681名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间535–681名内，建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如530名以内）可重点冲一档徐特立英才班或卓越班；位次在区间中段（约600名 左右）以智能制造与智能车辆菁英班为主攻方向；位次接近区间上限（约680名）建议以理学与材料菁英班保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 699 → 1089 → 578. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift (intensified competition after enrollment expansion), and in 2025, it rebounded sharply to 578, showing large fluctuations. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 578. The provincial science enrollment plan was 35 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 32 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 32, unchanged from 2025, but the total number of candidates in Xinjiang for the 2026 Gaokao is about 238,000 (a significant increase of about 3 times compared to approximately 76,500 in 2025), leading to markedly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 14th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a continuous upward trend in recent years (19th in 2021 → 13th in 2025 → 14th in 2026), belonging to the top-tier science and engineering universities in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents such as Gong Lin's ethical misconduct, but the school responded relatively quickly. Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, overall attention is acceptable. Information and Communication Engineering, Control Science and Engineering are A+; Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering are A; Mathematics, Physics, Mechanics, etc., are A-; a total of 12 A-class disciplines, with extremely strong engineering strength, highly attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, highly matching BIT's advantageous disciplines. The total number of candidates in Xinjiang in 2026 has significantly increased.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 578, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Xinjiang (intensified competition), and the somewhat negative school reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for science subjects in 2026 will slightly shift backward to approximately 608, with a range of 535–681.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xu Teli Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Precision Engineering Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top-Notch Plan)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Manufacturing and Smart Vehicle Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Science and Materials Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 535–681, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 530), focus on reaching for Tier 1 Xu Teli Elite Class or Excellence Class. For rankings in the middle of the range (around 600), target the Smart Manufacturing and Smart Vehicle Elite Class as the main direction. For rankings near the upper limit (around 680), it is recommended to use the Science and Materials Elite Class as a safety.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合202 5年基准位次284、2026年招生计划大幅缩减50%、考生总数增加等因素，结合文科考生规模扩大做小幅修正，预计2026年文科最低位次 约214名，区间164–264名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts has gradually moved forward: approximately 308 → 301 → 284, indicating intensifying competition; the baseline for 2025 is about 284th place; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 3 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 4 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 2, a 50% reduction from 2025, a significant cut, greatly increasing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 14th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, a top national university, strongly attractive to liberal arts students; the 2026 reputation is slightly negative, but mainly involves events in science and engineering fields, with limited impact on liberal arts admissions; Douyin popularity is moderate, overall attention is moderate; Business Administration is rated A-, somewhat related to economics, social work, law, etc., in the liberal arts social science experimental class; although law is not an A-class discipline at BIT, the university's high level makes liberal arts majors still competitive.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is relatively popular (recommended), social science majors are generally stable; the total number of examinees in Xinjiang in 2026 has increased significantly, with about 75,000 liberal arts examinees (estimated), intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 284, the 2026 enrollment plan significantly reduced by 50%, and the increase in examinee numbers, combined with a small adjustment for the expanded scale of liberal arts examinees, the estimated minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 is about 214th, with a range of 164–264.
